label: Claude-in-Chrome real-browser surface
notes: Call mcp__claude-in-chrome__tabs_context_mcp once before any other browser tool, and create a fresh tab with tabs_create_mcp instead of reusing existing tabs.

Raw computer screenshots are NOT file-addressable: save_to_disk returns an opaque id, never a path. The only file-addressable capture is gif_creator: start_recording before the interaction, stop_recording after, then export with download:true and a meaningful filename; the .gif lands in ~/Downloads — copy it into the run evidence dir before attaching.

Screenshots may be scaled relative to the CSS viewport; click coordinates are interpreted in screenshot space, and zoom regions must also be expressed in screenshot space. When a coordinate click silently no-ops (overlays, backdrops), fall back to find + ref-based clicks.
Element refs from find/read_page go stale whenever the target re-renders; re-run find per step instead of caching refs across page updates.
browser_batch executes sequentially and stops at the first error; keep batches to 2-6 actions and end each batch with a screenshot so the next batch's coordinates are grounded.
read_console_messages and read_network_requests return text only; persist their output to files in the run evidence dir yourself before citing them as evidence.
Do not trigger JavaScript alerts/confirms/prompts; they block the extension. Prefer console.log plus read_console_messages when debugging.
